name: Add GST to Amazon Australia Products in Neto
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can ensure proper GST tax handling for your Amazon Australia product listings by understanding how Neto manages tax-inclusive and tax-free product pricing that aligns with Australian tax requirements. This tax configuration helps ensure compliance with Amazon Australia's GST policies while maintaining accurate pricing that reflects the appropriate tax treatment, supporting proper financial record-keeping and customer transparency for your Australian marketplace operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Properly configured product tax settings enable accurate order processing and financial reconciliation by ensuring orders downloaded from Amazon Australia reflect the correct tax status based on your product configuration in Neto. Understanding the relationship between your product's tax settings and how they appear on Amazon listings helps ensure pricing accuracy and regulatory compliance while supporting smooth order fulfillment processes that maintain customer trust and operational efficiency across your multi-channel business."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As a merchant within Amazon Australia, most products sold attract the standard 10% Goods and Services Tax (GST)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Currently, there is no way to flag products as 'tax free', or 'includes tax' within Amazon Australia. However, whilst there is a tax field in most Amazon product import templates, it is not yet active. As such, Amazon assumes that if you're listing a product that incurs GST, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.amazon.com.au/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=201895790", "children": [{"text": "you are adding the appropriate amount of tax (if any)"}]}, {"text": " to the cost of the product. In other words, if the products you sell attract GST, your prices on Amazon.com.au must include GST."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ": To view Amazon Australia\u2019s tax policy, log in to your seller account and click"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Further information about Amazon Australia and GST can be found "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.amazon.com.au/gp/help/customer/display.html/ref=hp_left_v4_sib?ie=UTF8&nodeId=201895740", "children": [{"text": "within the Amazon Australia help site"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As a Neto customer, all products will be listed within Amazon Australia according to the price listed for each product (in the selected price group or default if configured). Therefore, if a product is listed as Tax Free or Tax Inclusive it will list within Amazon Australia for the amount listed on the product card."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When orders are created, Neto validates orderliness against the product (in Neto) to determine if the product is tax free or tax inclusive. Once determined, the tax displays on the order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "View or Change the Tax Status of a Product"}], "data-id": "view-or-change-the-tax-status-of-a-product"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "SKU", (either "}, {"text": "Tax Free Product", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Tax Inclusive", "bold": true}, {"text": ")."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text":
